response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine geospatial credibility through GISCollective and Green Map GIS work, and has demonstrated high-throughput distributed systems experience at Sociomantic handling millions of requests per second. However, the role's non-negotiable core is modern C++ or Rust, and his C++ exposure is minimal and over a decade old (National Instruments 2014–2015, a bachelor thesis audio project). His primary production stack is TypeScript/JavaScript/DLang with no Rust anywhere on the resume. There is no evidence of routing tile pipelines, navigation guidance systems, or the systems-level map data transformation work central to this position.
strengths: Geospatial platform experience via GISCollective and Green Map GIS applications, including a FOSS4G conference talk
High-performance, low-latency distributed systems work handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Sociomantic (async I/O, caching, fibers)
Strong software craftsmanship culture with TDD, CI/CD, and authored testing tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial)
concerns: C++ experience is minimal and a decade stale; zero Rust experience mentioned anywhere
No routing tile generation, navigation pipeline, or map data transformation experience
Primary production expertise is web and TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level or embedded programming required here

key_factors.factor: No routing or navigation pipeline experience
